production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli=pd.DataFrame({'cliente_id':['C001','C002']})
tx=pd.DataFrame({'cliente_id':['C001'],'monto':[1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on='cliente_id', how='left')
print(len(m))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Left join conserva clientes sin tx; len=2 (T1-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"]})
print(bool(cli["cliente_id"].is_unique))
exercises.justification_from_packet: is_unique mide cardinalidad 1:1 de la clave antes del merge (T1-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"] * 3, "monto": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]})
print(len(cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="inner")))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Fan-out 1:m: inner multiplica filas por el lado m → 3 (T1-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"], "monto": [1.0]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(m.loc[m["_merge"] == "left_only", "cliente_id"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Anti-join: left_only = huérfanos sin match (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
b = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1]})
try:
    a.merge(b, on="id", validate="one_to_one")
except Exception:
    print("fail")
exercises.justification_from_packet: validate='one_to_one' falla si cardinalidad no es 1:1 (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
cli = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002", "C003"]})
tx = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
m = cli.merge(tx, on="cliente_id", how="left", indicator=True)
print(int((m["_merge"] == "left_only").sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Conteo de left_only para dashboard de huérfanos (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 2], "a": [10, 20], "b": [3, 4]})
print(len(df.melt(id_vars="id", value_vars=["a", "b"])))
exercises.justification_from_packet: melt wide→long: n_filas * n_value_vars = 4 (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1], "k": ["a", "b"], "v": [1.0, 2.0]})
wide = long.pivot_table(index="id", columns="k", values="v", aggfunc="sum").reset_index()
print(wide.columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: pivot_table long→wide con aggfunc sum y reset_index (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
a = pd.DataFrame({"x": [1]})
b = pd.DataFrame({"x": [2]})
print(len(pd.concat([a, b], ignore_index=True)))
exercises.justification_from_packet: concat vertical apila casos (axis=0) → len 2 (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
long = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1, 1], "mes": ["e", "f"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
wide = long.pivot(index="id", columns="mes", values="monto")
wide.columns = [f"monto_{c}" for c in wide.columns]
print(list(wide.columns))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Renombrar post-pivot a monto_{mes} da schema estable (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame(columns=["cliente_id", "monto_ene"])
expected = {"cliente_id", "monto_ene"}
print(set(df.columns) == expected)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Validación de schema por set de columnas (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1]})
print(df.rename(columns={"a": "monto"}).columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: rename(columns=...) explícito preferible a reasignar .columns (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())
exercises.justification_from_packet: groupby + sum colapsa montos por región a una fila por clave (T3-A); es el resumen ejecutivo del theory, no transform.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [1.0, 3.0, 2.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].transform("mean").tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: transform reinyecta el agregado al shape original (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [1.0, 2.0]})
out = df.groupby("region", as_index=False).agg(total=("monto", "sum"), n=("monto", "count"))
print(out.columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: named agg + as_index=False produce columnas region/total/n (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0]).rolling(2).mean()
print([None if pd.isna(x) else float(x) for x in s])
exercises.justification_from_packet: rolling mean window=2: primer punto sin ventana completa es NaN (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-05", "2024-03-01", "2024-02-10"]),
})
first = df.groupby("cliente_id")["fecha"].transform("min")
cohort = first.dt.to_period("M").astype(str)
print(df.assign(cohort=cohort).drop_duplicates("cliente_id").set_index("cliente_id")["cohort"].to_dict())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Cohorte YYYY-MM por min fecha del cliente (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([3.0, 1.0, 2.0], index=pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-03", "2024-01-01", "2024-01-02"]))
r = s.sort_index().rolling(2).mean()
print(float(r.iloc[-1]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: sort_index antes de rolling para orden temporal correcto (T3-B).

exercises.code:
parts = [10.0, 20.0, 70.0]
total = 100.0
print(abs(sum(parts) - total) < 1e-9)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Reconciliación de totales con tolerancia eps (T4-A).

pagados = 10

exercises.code:
total = 100.0
lima = 60.0
print(total - lima)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Bridge residual del cierre analítico: residual = total − lima (100−60=40.0) como primer tramo de la bridge (T4-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-02-01"]), "monto": [1.0, 9.0]})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
print(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Filtro pre-cutoff: solo fechas <= cutoff (T4-B anti-leakage).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-03-01"]), "monto": [10.0, 5.0]})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
sum_total = float(tx["monto"].sum())
sum_pre = float(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].sum())
print(sum_total - sum_pre)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Leakage temporal T4-B: delta = total − pre-cutoff captura montos posteriores que no deben filtrar al pasado del modelo.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "2024-05-01"]),
    "monto": [3.0, 10.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-02-01")
pre = tx[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff]
print(pre.groupby("cliente_id")["monto"].max().to_dict())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Feature as-of: max monto con fecha<=cutoff, no max global (T4-B).

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: validate='one_to_one' falla si la cardinalidad del merge no es 1:1 (T1-B).
left_only identifica filas del left sin match en right (anti-join T1-B).
transform reinyecta el agregado al shape original (T3-A).
Leakage: incluir datos posteriores al cutoff en features del pasado (T4-B).
Si suma(partes)≠total, documentar diff con eps o corregir el corte (T4-A).
